creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: mfechner
Date: Tue Aug 11 14:15:02 UTC 2020
New revision: 544686
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/544686

Log:
  Switch gitlab internal webserver to puma.
  Gitlab switched with version 13.0 to puma as default.

  PR:		247564

  head/www/rubygem-gitlab-puma/Makefile
  head/www/rubygem-gitlab-puma/files/
